prompt: A high-quality 3D animated cinematic shot of a black and white tuxedo cat police officer extending a white-gloved hand for a handshake to a tall, stylish anthropomorphic blonde fox. The fox is smirking with one hand in his pocket, wearing a teal open shirt over a white t-shirt, white pants, and a gold chain. They are standing in a modern, upscale office lobby. On the left wall, a metallic 3D star logo reads "Paw Star ENTERTAINMENT" above a sleek reception desk. The background features a black leather sofa, a potted plant, and wall decor including 3 framed gold records and 2 framed posters featuring the fox. The image features detailed fur textures, realistic clothing materials, and soft, professional studio lighting typical of modern animated feature films.
